docos-route.description: Route a document to the optimal parsing pipeline based on extracted signals

docos-parse.description: Parse a raw document into canonical DocIR using route-selected parser

docos-extract.description: Extract entities, claims, and relations from DocIR

docos-patch.description: Compile wiki pages and generate patches for changes

docos-lint.description: Run lint checks on wiki state

docos-review.description: Manage review queue for high-risk items
